scripts.dev: concurrently --names mastra,web --prefix-colors magenta,cyan "pnpm -C packages/mastra dev" "pnpm -C packages/web dev"
scripts.build: pnpm -C packages/mastra build && pnpm -C packages/web build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm -C packages/mastra exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm -C packages/web exec tsc --noEmit
